allow: PowerShell(1..5 | ForEach-Object { $r = Resolve-DnsName -Name aws-1-ap-northeast-1.pooler.supabase.com -Type A -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "try $_`: OK -> " + \(\($r | Where-Object {$_.IPAddress} | Select-Object -First 1\).IPAddress\) } else { "try $_`: FAILED" } })

PowerShell(1..5 | ForEach-Object { node -e "const d=require\('dns'\);const t=Date.now\(\);d.lookup\('aws-1-ap-northeast-1.pooler.supabase.com',\(e,a\)=>console.log\(e?\('FAILED '+e.code+' in '+\(Date.now\(\)-t\)+'ms'\):\('OK '+a+' in '+\(Date.now\(\)-t\)+'ms'\)\)\)" })
PowerShell(Get-DnsClientServerAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.ServerAddresses } | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, ServerAddresses | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("--- via 8.8.8.8 ---"; 1..3 | ForEach-Object { $r = Resolve-DnsName -Name aws-1-ap-northeast-1.pooler.supabase.com -Type A -Server 8.8.8.8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { "try $_`: OK" } else { "try $_`: FAILED" } })
PowerShell(1..6 | ForEach-Object { $out = node db-probe.mjs 2>&1 | Out-String; if \($out -notmatch "ENOTFOUND"\) { $out; break } else { "attempt $_`: DNS miss, retrying..." } })
